meta.description: Compressed hunt cards for sui-move — one-line detection rules for bulk scanning
meta.usage: Load cards into context. For each card, grep target code for card.grep. On hit: execute card.check steps directly. Only read full DB entry (card.ref + card.lines) for confirmed true/likely positives.

cards.title: Downloaded Artifacts Summary
cards.detect: Downloaded Artifacts Summary
check: VERIFY: Downloaded Artifacts Summary

cards.title: Protocol Coverage
cards.detect: Protocol Coverage

cards.title: Artifact Location
cards.detect: All artifacts are stored in:
check: VERIFY: All artifacts are stored in:

cards.title: Move Access Control and Authorization Vulnerabilities
cards.detect: Move uses different access control paradigms per chain:
check: VERIFY: Move uses different access control paradigms per chain:

cards.title: Pattern 1: Public Signer Capability Exposure — move-acl-001
cards.detect: Public function returns signer for any distributor
check: VERIFY: Public function returns signer for any distributor
ANTIPATTERN: Initialization uses signer-derived address, but access uses hardcoded
cards.antipattern: Initialization uses signer-derived address, but access uses hardcoded
cards.securePattern: Make signer retrieval friend-only or internal

cards.title: Pattern 2: Missing Authorization on Sensitive Functions — move-acl-002
cards.detect: No access control on trading account retrieval
check: VERIFY: No access control on trading account retrieval
ANTIPATTERN: No authorization check on cross-chain message sending
cards.antipattern: No authorization check on cross-chain message sending
cards.securePattern: Move payload marking into treasury with access control

cards.title: Pattern 3: Role Separation Violations — move-acl-003
cards.detect: OR logic lets listing admin do pool admin actions
check: VERIFY: OR logic lets listing admin do pool admin actions
ANTIPATTERN: Some functions check issuer role, others check transfer_agent
cards.antipattern: Some functions check issuer role, others check transfer_agent
cards.securePattern: Separate functions for separate roles

cards.title: Pattern 4: Missing Capability Revocation — move-acl-004
cards.detect: Caps can be generated but never revoked
check: VERIFY: Caps can be generated but never revoked
ANTIPATTERN: Parameter update doesn't update last_used timestamp
cards.antipattern: Parameter update doesn't update last_used timestamp
cards.securePattern: Generate and revoke capabilities

cards.title: Pattern 5: Missing Version Checks on State Objects — move-acl-005
cards.detect: Admin functions don't check state version
check: VERIFY: Admin functions don't check state version
cards.antipattern: Admin functions don't check state version
cards.securePattern: Version check on all entry points

cards.title: Pattern 6: Unverified Object/Pool Instance in Operations — move-acl-006
cards.detect: Doesn't verify correct SupplyPool instance
check: VERIFY: Doesn't verify correct SupplyPool instance
All public functions returning signers are friend-only or internal
Every state-modifying public function has authorization check
Role checks use AND for higher privilege, not OR
LOOK FOR: Pattern 1: `public fun` returning `signer` or exposing signer capability
cards.antipattern: Doesn't verify correct SupplyPool instance
cards.securePattern: Verify supply pool matches position's expected pool

cards.title: Move Arithmetic and Precision Vulnerabilities
cards.detect: Move uses unsigned integers (u8, u64, u128, u256) that abort on overflow/underflow rather than wrapping.
check: VERIFY: Move uses unsigned integers (u8, u64, u128, u256) that abort on overflow/underflow rather than wrapping.

cards.title: Pattern 1: Double Scaling in Invariant Checks — move-arith-001
cards.detect: Double upscaling in flashloan repayment validation
check: VERIFY: Double upscaling in flashloan repayment validation
ANTIPATTERN: Overly strict assertion doesn't account for rounding
cards.antipattern: Overly strict assertion doesn't account for rounding
cards.securePattern: Apply metastable upscaling exactly once

cards.title: Pattern 2: Division Before Multiplication Precision Loss — move-arith-002
cards.detect: Division before multiplication loses precision
check: VERIFY: Division before multiplication loses precision
cards.antipattern: Division before multiplication loses precision
cards.securePattern: Multiplication before division preserves precision

cards.title: Pattern 3: Division by Zero in Pool/Staking Operations — move-arith-003
cards.detect: No guard against zero reserve in division
check: VERIFY: No guard against zero reserve in division
ANTIPATTERN: Weight can be zero if node's stake is too low
cards.antipattern: Weight can be zero if node's stake is too low
cards.securePattern: Check for zero before division

cards.title: Pattern 4: Rounding Direction Exploits in Share Minting/Burning — move-arith-004
cards.detect: Rounding to 1 causes overpayment
check: VERIFY: Rounding to 1 causes overpayment
ANTIPATTERN: Rounding up causes users to supply more than needed
cards.antipattern: Rounding up causes users to supply more than needed
cards.securePattern: Round DOWN on minting (fewer shares), round UP on burning (more tokens needed)

cards.title: Pattern 5: Overflow in Fee/Reward Calculations — move-arith-005
cards.detect: Overflow when token_amount * fee_bips exceeds u64::MAX
check: VERIFY: Overflow when token_amount * fee_bips exceeds u64::MAX
cards.antipattern: Overflow when token_amount * fee_bips exceeds u64::MAX
cards.securePattern: Cast to u128 for intermediate calculation

cards.title: Pattern 6: Negative Value Mishandling in Signed Arithmetic — move-arith-006
cards.detect: Negative balance converted to large positive
check: VERIFY: Negative balance converted to large positive
ANTIPATTERN: Subtraction can underflow if lock_time > current time
cards.antipattern: Subtraction can underflow if lock_time > current time
cards.securePattern: Check sign before conversion

cards.title: Pattern 7: Faulty Constant Definitions — move-arith-007
cards.detect: Missing final digit in MAX_U64 constant
check: VERIFY: Missing final digit in MAX_U64 constant
cards.antipattern: Missing final digit in MAX_U64 constant
cards.securePattern: Use compiler-checked maximum value

cards.title: Pattern 8: Fee Accounting Denomination Errors — move-arith-008
cards.detect: Fallthrough when deep_quantity is zero
check: VERIFY: Fallthrough when deep_quantity is zero
Verify scaling functions are applied exactly once per calculation path
Check all division operations have zero-denominator guards
Confirm multiplication happens before division in multi-step calculations
LOOK FOR: Pattern 1: `upscale` or `scale` called more than once on same variable
cards.antipattern: Returns 0 when fee_bips == MAX_FEE_BIPS
cards.securePattern: Handle all fee denomination cases explicitly

cards.title: Move Cross-Chain and Bridge Vulnerabilities
cards.detect: Comprehensive patterns for cross-chain messaging, bridge validation, payload front-running, validator set integrity,...
check: VERIFY: Comprehensive patterns for cross-chain messaging, bridge validation, payload front-running, validator set integrity,...

cards.title: Pattern 1: Payload Front-Running via Public Validation — move-bridge-001
cards.detect: Anyone can call validate_and_store_payload
check: VERIFY: Anyone can call validate_and_store_payload
cards.antipattern: Anyone can call validate_and_store_payload
cards.securePattern: Combine validation and minting into single atomic operation

cards.title: Pattern 2: Missing Validator Set Integrity Checks — move-bridge-002
cards.detect: Multiple missing checks
check: VERIFY: Multiple missing checks
ANTIPATTERN: Multiple missing checks
cards.antipattern: Multiple missing checks
cards.securePattern: Complete validator set validation

cards.title: Pattern 3: Cross-Chain Message Validation Bypass — move-bridge-003
cards.detect: No validation on incoming cross-chain message
check: VERIFY: No validation on incoming cross-chain message
ANTIPATTERN: Uses balance instead of message source for asset routing
cards.antipattern: Uses balance instead of message source for asset routing
cards.securePattern: Validate incoming message schema and source

cards.title: Pattern 4: Unrestricted Cross-Chain Message Sending — move-bridge-004
cards.detect: Any user can send arbitrary cross-chain messages
check: VERIFY: Any user can send arbitrary cross-chain messages
cards.antipattern: Any user can send arbitrary cross-chain messages
cards.securePattern: Capability-gated messaging

cards.title: Pattern 5: Signature Replay in Cross-Chain Claims — move-bridge-005
cards.detect: Valid signatures can be retransmitted
check: VERIFY: Valid signatures can be retransmitted
cards.antipattern: Valid signatures can be retransmitted
cards.securePattern: Track used signatures

cards.title: Pattern 6: Fund Loss via Object ID Transfer — move-bridge-006
cards.detect: Gas recipient may be an object ID, not an address
check: VERIFY: Gas recipient may be an object ID, not an address
Payload validation and minting are atomic (single function)
Validator set checks: no duplicates, key length, threshold ≤ total weight
All incoming cross-chain messages validated for schema and source
LOOK FOR: Pattern 1: `public fun validate_and_store_payload` separate from mint
cards.antipattern: Gas recipient may be an object ID, not an address
cards.securePattern: Validate recipient is a user address, not object ID

cards.title: Move DeFi Protocol Logic Vulnerabilities
cards.detect: Comprehensive patterns for reward miscalculation, solvency failures, withdrawal logic bugs, claim exploits, liquidation...
check: VERIFY: Comprehensive patterns for reward miscalculation, solvency failures, withdrawal logic bugs, claim exploits, liquidation...

cards.title: Pattern 1: Incorrect Reward Initialization Timing — move-defi-001
cards.detect: New reward program starts all users at current time
check: VERIFY: New reward program starts all users at current time
ANTIPATTERN: Restart doesn't account for inactive period [t0, t1]
cards.antipattern: Restart doesn't account for inactive period [t0, t1]
cards.securePattern: Snapshot accumulated_per_share before restart

cards.title: Pattern 2: Missing Solvency Check on Withdrawals — move-defi-002
cards.detect: No solvency check after withdrawal
check: VERIFY: No solvency check after withdrawal
ANTIPATTERN: Validator removed but staked funds not recovered
cards.antipattern: Validator removed but staked funds not recovered
cards.securePattern: Validate solvency after withdrawal

cards.title: Pattern 3: Flashloan Repayment Bypass via Double Scaling — move-defi-003
cards.detect: balances_after_flashloan applies upscaling twice
check: VERIFY: balances_after_flashloan applies upscaling twice
cards.antipattern: balances_after_flashloan applies upscaling twice
cards.securePattern: Compare balances at same scaling level

cards.title: Pattern 4: Excessive Claims via Missing Cumulative Tracking — move-defi-004
cards.detect: Each claim only checks current unlock, not cumulative
check: VERIFY: Each claim only checks current unlock, not cumulative
cards.antipattern: Each claim only checks current unlock, not cumulative
cards.securePattern: Track cumulative claims

cards.title: Pattern 5: Fee Accounting Mismatch — move-defi-005
cards.detect: Zero deep_quantity causes fee denomination switch
check: VERIFY: Zero deep_quantity causes fee denomination switch
cards.antipattern: Zero deep_quantity causes fee denomination switch
cards.securePattern: Deduct fees before share calculation

cards.title: Pattern 6: Forced Withdrawal Tolerance Bypass — move-defi-006
cards.detect: Tolerance check skipped when base is zero
check: VERIFY: Tolerance check skipped when base is zero
ANTIPATTERN: Signed-to-unsigned conversion flips negative to large positive
cards.antipattern: Signed-to-unsigned conversion flips negative to large positive
cards.securePattern: Always enforce tolerance, handle signed values correctly

cards.title: Pattern 7: State Desynchronization Between Modules — move-defi-007
cards.detect: Obligations created without Bank module awareness
check: VERIFY: Obligations created without Bank module awareness
ANTIPATTERN: Future commission rate used for current distribution
cards.antipattern: Future commission rate used for current distribution
cards.securePattern: Use epoch-specific commission rate

cards.title: Pattern 8: Permissionless Front-Running of Auctions/Orders — move-defi-008
cards.detect: Anyone can fulfill before penalty period starts
check: VERIFY: Anyone can fulfill before penalty period starts
cards.antipattern: Anyone can fulfill before penalty period starts
cards.securePattern: Designated driver always has priority

cards.title: Pattern 9: Incorrect Withdrawal/Vesting Abort Conditions — move-defi-009
cards.detect: Assumes amount > minimum_pending_inactive threshold
check: VERIFY: Assumes amount > minimum_pending_inactive threshold
Reward programs snapshot accumulated state before restart
All withdrawal paths check post-withdrawal solvency
Flashloan repayment compared at same scaling level
LOOK FOR: Pattern 1: Reward initialization with `timestamp::now_seconds()` in add_program
cards.antipattern: Assumes amount > minimum_pending_inactive threshold
cards.securePattern: Validate amount > 0, handle edge cases

cards.title: Move Denial of Service Vulnerabilities
cards.detect: Comprehensive patterns for denial of service attacks in Move-based smart contracts, including unbounded storage growth,...
check: VERIFY: Comprehensive patterns for denial of service attacks in Move-based smart contracts, including unbounded storage growth,...

cards.title: Pattern 1: Unbounded Vector Growth Causing Gas Exhaustion — move-dos-001
cards.detect: Vector-backed rewards map grows unbounded
check: VERIFY: Vector-backed rewards map grows unbounded
ANTIPATTERN: Zero-balance deposits/withdrawals still counted
cards.antipattern: Zero-balance deposits/withdrawals still counted
cards.securePattern: Bounded rewards with cleanup

cards.title: Pattern 2: Front-Running Resource/Account Creation — move-dos-002
cards.detect: Anyone can create a primary store at any address
check: VERIFY: Anyone can create a primary store at any address
cards.antipattern: Anyone can create a primary store at any address
cards.securePattern: Use unpredictable seeds or handle existing accounts

cards.title: Pattern 3: Event/Object Limit Exhaustion — move-dos-003
cards.detect: Each order cancellation emits events
check: VERIFY: Each order cancellation emits events
ANTIPATTERN: No length limit on public key stored in object
cards.antipattern: No length limit on public key stored in object
cards.securePattern: Validate public key length

cards.title: Pattern 4: Division by Zero in Pool/Epoch Operations — move-dos-004
cards.detect: No guard against zero reserves
check: VERIFY: No guard against zero reserves
ANTIPATTERN: Share amount can be manipulated to zero
cards.antipattern: Share amount can be manipulated to zero
cards.securePattern: Guard all divisions against zero denominator

cards.title: Pattern 5: Hash Collision DoS in Address-Keyed Tables — move-dos-005
cards.detect: User-controlled address keys can collide
check: VERIFY: User-controlled address keys can collide
cards.antipattern: User-controlled address keys can collide
cards.securePattern: Use Table (BTreeMap-based) instead of SmartTable for user-keyed data

cards.title: Pattern 6: Overflow Abort in Arithmetic Operations — move-dos-006
cards.detect: Large amount * fee_bips can overflow u64
check: VERIFY: Large amount * fee_bips can overflow u64
cards.antipattern: Large amount * fee_bips can overflow u64
cards.securePattern: Use u128 intermediate for overflow prevention

cards.title: Pattern 7: Mint/Rate Limit Exhaustion — move-dos-007
cards.detect: Wrap/unwrap count toward epoch limit
check: VERIFY: Wrap/unwrap count toward epoch limit
cards.antipattern: Wrap/unwrap count toward epoch limit
cards.securePattern: Per-user rate limiting or separate internal/external limits

cards.title: Pattern 8: Missing Parameter Validation Causing Protocol Halt — move-dos-008
cards.detect: Commission rate not bounded
check: VERIFY: Commission rate not bounded
All vector iterations have bounded gas cost or pagination
Resource account seeds include unpredictable components
Event emission in loops bounded by constant or batch size
LOOK FOR: Pattern 1: `while (i < vector::length(...))` in functions called by liquidate/withdraw
cards.antipattern: Commission rate not bounded
cards.securePattern: Validate all parameters at entry

cards.title: Move Merkle Proof Verification Vulnerabilities
cards.detect: Comprehensive patterns for Merkle proof replay, verification bypass, unchecked return values, and domain separation...
check: VERIFY: Comprehensive patterns for Merkle proof replay, verification bypass, unchecked return values, and domain separation...

cards.title: Pattern 1: Merkle Proof Replay via Missing Index in Hash — move-merkle-001
cards.detect: leaf_index not part of the leaf hash
check: VERIFY: leaf_index not part of the leaf hash
cards.antipattern: leaf_index not part of the leaf hash
cards.securePattern: Include leaf_index in hash to prevent replay

cards.title: Pattern 2: Flawed Merkle Proof Verification Logic — move-merkle-002
cards.detect: Checks less-than instead of equal
check: VERIFY: Checks less-than instead of equal
cards.antipattern: Checks less-than instead of equal
cards.securePattern: Check equality, not ordering

cards.title: Pattern 3: Unchecked Merkle Verification Return Value — move-merkle-003
cards.detect: Verification result ignored
check: VERIFY: Verification result ignored
ANTIPATTERN: Verification result ignored
cards.antipattern: Verification result ignored
cards.securePattern: Assert verification result

cards.title: Pattern 4: Fee Bypass at Maximum Fee Setting — move-merkle-004
cards.detect: Edge case at maximum fee setting
check: VERIFY: Edge case at maximum fee setting
Leaf hash includes ALL claim parameters (index, address, amount, nonce)
Merkle verification checks hash EQUALITY (not less-than or greater-than)
`verify()` return value always wrapped in `assert!()`
LOOK FOR: Pattern 1: `hash(address, amount)` without leaf_index in airdrop claims
cards.antipattern: Edge case at maximum fee setting
cards.securePattern: MAX_FEE_BIPS returns full amount as fee

cards.title: Move Oracle and Pricing Vulnerabilities
cards.detect: Comprehensive patterns for stale oracle prices, update skipping, SLTP clipping bugs, undervalued collateral, price...
check: VERIFY: Comprehensive patterns for stale oracle prices, update skipping, SLTP clipping bugs, undervalued collateral, price...

cards.title: Pattern 1: Missing Staleness Check on Oracle Price — move-oracle-001
cards.detect: No staleness check on oracle price
check: VERIFY: No staleness check on oracle price
cards.antipattern: No staleness check on oracle price
cards.securePattern: Enforce maximum price age

cards.title: Pattern 2: Oracle Update Skipped on Same Tick — move-oracle-002
cards.detect: Update skipped when tick doesn't change
check: VERIFY: Update skipped when tick doesn't change
cards.antipattern: Update skipped when tick doesn't change
cards.securePattern: Update oracle on every swap regardless of tick change

cards.title: Pattern 3: SLTP Size Clipping via Signed/Unsigned Conversion — move-oracle-003
cards.detect: Negative base position becomes huge u64
check: VERIFY: Negative base position becomes huge u64
cards.antipattern: Negative base position becomes huge u64
cards.securePattern: Use absolute value for position size comparison

cards.title: Pattern 4: Undervalued Collateral from Oracle Mispricing — move-oracle-004
cards.detect: Simple price lookup doesn't account for LPT mechanics
check: VERIFY: Simple price lookup doesn't account for LPT mechanics
cards.antipattern: Simple price lookup doesn't account for LPT mechanics
cards.securePattern: Calculate LPT value from underlying components

cards.title: Pattern 5: Incorrect Price Boundary Checks — move-oracle-005
cards.detect: >= and <= allow price to equal boundary
check: VERIFY: >= and <= allow price to equal boundary
cards.antipattern: >= and <= allow price to equal boundary
cards.securePattern: Strict inequalities at boundaries

cards.title: Pattern 6: Faulty Constant Definition — move-oracle-006
cards.detect: Constant has wrong number of digits
check: VERIFY: Constant has wrong number of digits
cards.antipattern: Constant has wrong number of digits
cards.securePattern: Correct constant

cards.title: Pattern 7: Unauthorized Price Feed Registration — move-oracle-007
cards.detect: No specific authority verification
check: VERIFY: No specific authority verification
cards.antipattern: No specific authority verification
cards.securePattern: Require specific authority type

cards.title: Pattern 8: Fixed-Point Arithmetic Sign Bit Confusion — move-oracle-008
cards.detect: from_u256balance conflates sign bit with overflow
check: VERIFY: from_u256balance conflates sign bit with overflow
All oracle price reads include maximum age validation
TWAP/oracle observations updated on every price-changing event (not just tick change)
Signed-to-unsigned conversions use absolute value correctly
LOOK FOR: Pattern 1: `latest_round_data()` without timestamp age check
cards.antipattern: from_u256balance conflates sign bit with overflow
cards.securePattern: Separate sign handling from overflow detection

cards.title: Move Token Supply and Inflation Vulnerabilities
cards.detect: Comprehensive patterns for inflation attacks, double minting, supply manipulation, permanent freeze, and mint limit...
check: VERIFY: Comprehensive patterns for inflation attacks, double minting, supply manipulation, permanent freeze, and mint limit...

cards.title: Pattern 1: First-Depositor Inflation Attack — move-inflate-001
cards.detect: No minimum liquidity requirement
check: VERIFY: No minimum liquidity requirement
cards.antipattern: No minimum liquidity requirement
cards.securePattern: Minimum liquidity lock + minimum shares check

cards.title: Pattern 2: Double Minting via Fee Misaccounting — move-inflate-002
cards.detect: kAPT minted for full amount, but APT staked is net-of-fee
check: VERIFY: kAPT minted for full amount, but APT staked is net-of-fee
cards.antipattern: kAPT minted for full amount, but APT staked is net-of-fee
cards.securePattern: Deduct fees before share calculation

cards.title: Pattern 3: Uncapped Share/Token Minting — move-inflate-003
cards.detect: No cap on xLPT minting rate
check: VERIFY: No cap on xLPT minting rate
ANTIPATTERN: Admin can burn and reconcile without supply check
cards.antipattern: Admin can burn and reconcile without supply check
cards.securePattern: Cap minting and enforce supply invariants

cards.title: Pattern 4: Permanent Freeze Without Unfreeze — move-inflate-004
cards.detect: Freeze exists but no unfreeze
check: VERIFY: Freeze exists but no unfreeze
cards.antipattern: Freeze exists but no unfreeze
cards.securePattern: Both freeze and unfreeze

cards.title: Pattern 5: Improper Mint Limit Reset Logic — move-inflate-005
cards.detect: Incorrect variable reference on epoch boundary reset
check: VERIFY: Incorrect variable reference on epoch boundary reset
cards.antipattern: Incorrect variable reference on epoch boundary reset
cards.securePattern: Explicit limit reset with correct reference

cards.title: Pattern 6: Missing Activation Epoch Check in Staking — move-inflate-006
cards.detect: No activation epoch validation on join
check: VERIFY: No activation epoch validation on join
First deposit locks minimum liquidity (dead shares)
All minting uses net-of-fee amounts for share calculation
Total minted shares ≤ total backing invariant enforced
LOOK FOR: Pattern 1: `if (total_supply == 0) { shares = amount }` without minimum liquidity lock
cards.antipattern: No activation epoch validation on join
cards.securePattern: Validate matching epochs before join

cards.title: 1. EVM State Persistence Despite Sui Failure
cards.detect: The EVM side commits state changes before confirming the Sui-side transaction succeeded.
check: VERIFY: EVM side commits state changes before confirming the Sui-side transaction succeeded.
ANTIPATTERN: func ProcessCrossChainTx(ctx sdk.Context, cctx *types.CrossChainTx) error {
cards.antipattern: func ProcessCrossChainTx(ctx sdk.Context, cctx *types.CrossChainTx) error {
cards.securePattern: Use two-phase commit or cache-and-commit pattern

cards.title: 2. Outbound Nonce Manipulation DoS
cards.detect: Sequential nonce allows targeted blocking
check: VERIFY: Sequential nonce allows targeted blocking
cards.antipattern: Sequential nonce allows targeted blocking
cards.securePattern: Use nonce gap handling or parallel nonce pools

cards.title: 3. Sui Node DoS Blocks InTx Observation
cards.detect: Single RPC endpoint, no failover
check: VERIFY: Single RPC endpoint, no failover
cards.antipattern: Single RPC endpoint, no failover
cards.securePattern: Multiple RPC endpoints with failover

cards.title: 4. Missing Receiver Module Validation
cards.detect: Receiver not validated before creating outbound CCTX
check: VERIFY: Receiver not validated before creating outbound CCTX
cards.antipattern: Receiver not validated before creating outbound CCTX
cards.securePattern: Validate Sui address format before processing

cards.title: 5. Improper Coin Type Validation
cards.detect: Partial string match allows coin type spoofing
check: VERIFY: Partial string match allows coin type spoofing
cards.antipattern: Partial string match allows coin type spoofing
cards.securePattern: Validate full coin type path against known registry

cards.title: 6. Duplicate CCTX Re-signing
cards.detect: No check for existing signature
check: VERIFY: No check for existing signature
cards.antipattern: No check for existing signature
cards.securePattern: Check for existing signature before re-signing

cards.title: 7. TSS Fund Drainage via Gas Manipulation
cards.detect: Gas coin amount not properly bounded
check: VERIFY: Gas coin amount not properly bounded
cards.antipattern: Gas coin amount not properly bounded
cards.securePattern: Cap gas budget and validate against estimated cost

cards.title: 8. Wrong Gas Price for Outbound Transactions
cards.detect: Uses EVM gas price model for Sui
check: VERIFY: Uses EVM gas price model for Sui
cards.antipattern: Uses EVM gas price model for Sui
cards.securePattern: Use Sui-specific gas price query

cards.title: 9. Epoch Transition Failure via Duplicate PubKey
cards.detect: The Sui Bridge committee management uses `vec_map::insert` which aborts on duplicate keys.
check: VERIFY: Sui Bridge committee management uses `vec_map::insert` which aborts on duplicate keys.

cards.title: 10. Blocklist Iterator State Bug
cards.detect: The blocklist validation loop in Sui Bridge doesn't reset its iterator between list entries, causing incorrect...
check: VERIFY: blocklist validation loop in Sui Bridge doesn't reset its iterator between list entries, causing incorrect...

cards.title: 11. Cross-Chain Flow Rate Direction Mismatch
cards.detect: Axelar's cross-chain gateway on Sui tracks inbound and outbound token flows for rate limiting.
check: VERIFY: Axelar's cross-chain gateway on Sui tracks inbound and outbound token flows for rate limiting.

cards.title: 12. Wrong Integration Function Call
cards.detect: When integrating cross-chain message handling with flow limiters, calling the wrong function (e.
check: VERIFY: When integrating cross-chain message handling with flow limiters, calling the wrong function (e.

cards.title: 1. Public vs Public(package) Visibility Misuse
cards.detect: Functions that modify protocol-critical state (cooldown periods, limits, prices) are declared `public` instead of...
check: VERIFY: Functions that modify protocol-critical state (cooldown periods, limits, prices) are declared `public` instead of...
ANTIPATTERN: Public function allows anyone to reset cooldown
cards.antipattern: Public function allows anyone to reset cooldown
cards.securePattern: Restrict to same package only

cards.title: 2. Missing Owner/Authority Check
cards.detect: Anyone can withdraw from another user's farming position
check: VERIFY: Anyone can withdraw from another user's farming position
cards.antipattern: Anyone can withdraw from another user's farming position
cards.securePattern: Validate caller is position owner

cards.title: 3. Missing Object UID/ID Validation
cards.detect: BlueFin accepts any BankV2 — doesn't check it matches the vault
check: VERIFY: BlueFin accepts any BankV2 — doesn't check it matches the vault
cards.antipattern: BlueFin accepts any BankV2 — doesn't check it matches the vault
cards.securePattern: Validate all shared object identities

cards.title: 4. Trade Proof / Capability Bypass
cards.detect: Alternative proof generation path bypasses trader authorization
check: VERIFY: Alternative proof generation path bypasses trader authorization
cards.antipattern: Alternative proof generation path bypasses trader authorization
cards.securePattern: Both paths should enforce the same authorization

cards.title: 5. Flash Loan Receipt Manipulation
cards.detect: Receipt doesn't bind to specific pool
check: VERIFY: Receipt doesn't bind to specific pool
cards.antipattern: Receipt doesn't bind to specific pool
cards.securePattern: Receipt binds to specific pool

cards.title: 6. Missing ZK Proof Verification
cards.detect: ZK proof accepted without on-chain verification
check: VERIFY: ZK proof accepted without on-chain verification
cards.antipattern: ZK proof accepted without on-chain verification
cards.securePattern: Verify ZK proof on-chain before applying state changes

cards.title: 7. Signature Length / Format Validation
cards.detect: No length validation on signature bytes
check: VERIFY: No length validation on signature bytes
cards.antipattern: No length validation on signature bytes
cards.securePattern: Validate signature and key lengths before verification

cards.title: 8. Security Level Constraint Bypass
cards.detect: Security level check can be bypassed via alternative code path
check: VERIFY: Security level check can be bypassed via alternative code path
cards.antipattern: Security level check can be bypassed via alternative code path
cards.securePattern: Enforce security level on ALL withdrawal paths

cards.title: 9. Unsafe Role Removal
cards.detect: Can remove any member, including the last admin
check: VERIFY: Can remove any member, including the last admin
cards.antipattern: Can remove any member, including the last admin
cards.securePattern: Prevent removing last admin and validate member exists

cards.title: 10. Repeated Invocation / Replay
cards.detect: No tracking of whether user already claimed
check: VERIFY: No tracking of whether user already claimed
cards.antipattern: No tracking of whether user already claimed
cards.securePattern: Track claims and prevent replay

cards.title: 11. Inconsistent Assert Conditions
cards.detect: Assert condition is inverted
check: VERIFY: Assert condition is inverted
cards.antipattern: Assert condition is inverted
cards.securePattern: Correct comparison direction

cards.title: 12. Missing Range / Bounds Validation
cards.detect: TTL not checked against maximum
check: VERIFY: TTL not checked against maximum
ANTIPATTERN: Tick index not validated against tick spacing
cards.antipattern: Tick index not validated against tick spacing
cards.securePattern: Validate all bounds

cards.title: 13. Mint Limit Exhaustion DoS
cards.detect: No minimum mint amount, attacker can exhaust limit with dust
check: VERIFY: No minimum mint amount, attacker can exhaust limit with dust
cards.antipattern: No minimum mint amount, attacker can exhaust limit with dust
cards.securePattern: Enforce minimum mint amount

cards.title: 14. Excessive Gas Consumption DoS
cards.detect: Order matching loop can process unlimited orders
check: VERIFY: Order matching loop can process unlimited orders
cards.antipattern: Order matching loop can process unlimited orders
cards.securePattern: Limit matching iterations per transaction

cards.title: 15. Snapshot Integrity Bypass
cards.detect: Single admin can override snapshot root
check: VERIFY: Single admin can override snapshot root
cards.antipattern: Single admin can override snapshot root
cards.securePattern: Require multi-sig or time-locked update

cards.title: 16. Missing Invariant Enforcement
cards.detect: LP supply not validated after swap
check: VERIFY: LP supply not validated after swap
cards.antipattern: LP supply not validated after swap
cards.securePattern: Assert invariant after state mutation

cards.title: 17. Blocklist Implementation Flaws
cards.detect: Bridge and compliance systems use blocklists to prevent sanctioned addresses from transacting.
check: VERIFY: Bridge and compliance systems use blocklists to prevent sanctioned addresses from transacting.

cards.title: 18. Price Manipulation via Missing Guards
cards.detect: Pool NAV manipulated by direct coin transfer
check: VERIFY: Pool NAV manipulated by direct coin transfer
cards.antipattern: Pool NAV manipulated by direct coin transfer
cards.securePattern: Track "virtual" balance separately from actual balance

cards.title: 1. CLMM Sqrt-Price Overflow
cards.detect: `get_delta_b` computes `liquidity * (sqrt_price_b - sqrt_price_a)` which can overflow when liquidity is large and the tick range approaches extreme values.
check: VERIFY: `get_delta_b` computes `liquidity * (sqrt_price_b - sqrt_price_a)` which can overflow when liquidity is large and the tick range approaches extreme va
Verify all intermediate CLMM math uses u256 to prevent overflow
Test delta calculations at MIN_TICK and MAX_TICK boundaries
Check checked_shlw implementation for correct overflow detection
LOOK FOR: get_delta_a / get_delta_b using u128 multiplication
cards.antipattern: checked_shlw does not properly detect overflow
cards.securePattern: Use u256 throughout and assert no truncation

cards.title: 3. BigVector / Container Size Overflow
cards.detect: depth > 0 causes max_slice_size ^ (depth + 1) nodes
check: VERIFY: depth > 0 causes max_slice_size ^ (depth + 1) nodes
cards.antipattern: depth > 0 causes max_slice_size ^ (depth + 1) nodes
cards.securePattern: Size parameters chosen to stay under 256KB at maximum depth

cards.title: 4. Accumulator / Volume Counter Overflow
cards.detect: u64 volume accumulator overflows with high-volume pairs
check: VERIFY: u64 volume accumulator overflows with high-volume pairs
cards.antipattern: u64 volume accumulator overflows with high-volume pairs
cards.securePattern: Use u128 or u256 for volume accumulators

cards.title: 5. Type Boundary Overflow (u64 → u128)
cards.detect: amount * PRECISION can exceed u64
check: VERIFY: amount * PRECISION can exceed u64
ANTIPATTERN: Stress test may use voting_power near u64 max
cards.antipattern: Stress test may use voting_power near u64 max
cards.securePattern: Use u128 for intermediate calculations

cards.title: 6. RPC / Node-Crash Overflow
cards.detect: (Rust, Sui fullnode): Unchecked subtraction in select_coins
check: VERIFY: (Rust, Sui fullnode): Unchecked subtraction in select_coins
ANTIPATTERN: fn select_coins(coins: &[CoinData], amount: u64) -> Vec<ObjectID> {
cards.antipattern: fn select_coins(coins: &[CoinData], amount: u64) -> Vec<ObjectID> {
cards.securePattern: Use saturating subtraction

cards.title: 7. Faulty Constant Definitions
cards.detect: Missing digit — value is 10x too small
check: VERIFY: Missing digit — value is 10x too small
cards.antipattern: Missing digit — value is 10x too small
cards.securePattern: Use built-in constants or verify manually

cards.title: 8. Precision Loss in Token Redistribution
cards.detect: Integer division truncates, losing dust
check: VERIFY: Integer division truncates, losing dust
cards.antipattern: Integer division truncates, losing dust
cards.securePattern: Track cumulative distribution and handle remainder

cards.title: 9. Reward Calculation Rounding Errors
cards.detect: Accumulated rounding dust is silently lost each epoch
check: VERIFY: Accumulated rounding dust is silently lost each epoch
cards.antipattern: Accumulated rounding dust is silently lost each epoch
cards.securePattern: Use scaled accumulator pattern

cards.title: 10. Share Price Inflation / First-Depositor Attack
cards.detect: No minimum deposit, shares round to zero
check: VERIFY: No minimum deposit, shares round to zero
ANTIPATTERN: Persistent rounding errors inflate share price over time
cards.antipattern: Persistent rounding errors inflate share price over time
cards.securePattern: Virtual offset prevents the first-depositor inflation attack

cards.title: 11. Share-to-Asset Rounding Direction
cards.detect: Rounds DOWN when calculating SUI needed for shares
check: VERIFY: Rounds DOWN when calculating SUI needed for shares
cards.antipattern: Rounds DOWN when calculating SUI needed for shares
cards.securePattern: Round up when user is paying (deposit), round down when user is receiving

cards.title: 12. Incorrect Price Scaling / Conversion
cards.detect: Price feed uses 8 decimals but pool expects 18 decimals
check: VERIFY: Price feed uses 8 decimals but pool expects 18 decimals
cards.antipattern: Price feed uses 8 decimals but pool expects 18 decimals
cards.securePattern: Explicit decimal conversion

cards.title: 13. Incorrect Quantity Calculation in Order Books
cards.detect: Uses wrong quantity field in fill calculation
check: VERIFY: Uses wrong quantity field in fill calculation
ANTIPATTERN: quantity not updated correctly after partial fill
cards.antipattern: quantity not updated correctly after partial fill
cards.securePattern: Track unfilled quantity independently

cards.title: 14. Reward Period Miscalculation
cards.detect: Inclusive vs exclusive boundary error
check: VERIFY: Inclusive vs exclusive boundary error
cards.antipattern: Inclusive vs exclusive boundary error
cards.securePattern: Clamp to reward period boundaries

cards.title: 15. Improper Integer Type Conversion
cards.detect: Intermediate u128 result truncated to u64
check: VERIFY: Intermediate u128 result truncated to u64
cards.antipattern: Intermediate u128 result truncated to u64
cards.securePattern: Assert before truncation

cards.title: 1. Improper Stake Accounting Updates
cards.detect: The stake update function uses the wrong multiplier or doesn't account for compounding effects.
check: VERIFY: stake update function uses the wrong multiplier or doesn't account for compounding effects.
ANTIPATTERN: Uses absolute multiplier instead of relative
cards.antipattern: Uses absolute multiplier instead of relative
cards.securePattern: Use relative accumulator pattern

cards.title: 2. Tank/Stability Pool Value Update Errors
cards.detect: Updates tank total with deposited amount instead of net change
check: VERIFY: Updates tank total with deposited amount instead of net change
cards.antipattern: Updates tank total with deposited amount instead of net change
cards.securePattern: Track stablecoin deposits and collateral rewards separately

cards.title: 3. Surplus Claim Logic Failure
cards.detect: When total_deposit = 0, surplus cannot be distributed
check: VERIFY: When total_deposit = 0, surplus cannot be distributed
cards.antipattern: When total_deposit = 0, surplus cannot be distributed
cards.securePattern: Handle zero total_deposit case for surplus distribution

cards.title: 4. Incorrect Flow Rate Tracking
cards.detect: Inbound flow tracked as outbound (or vice versa)
check: VERIFY: Inbound flow tracked as outbound (or vice versa)
cards.antipattern: Inbound flow tracked as outbound (or vice versa)
cards.securePattern: Track correct flow direction

cards.title: 5. Wrong Function Call in Integration
cards.detect: Calls wrong flow tracking function
check: VERIFY: Calls wrong flow tracking function
cards.antipattern: Calls wrong flow tracking function
cards.securePattern: Correct function call matching the operation semantics

cards.title: 6. Reward Accumulation During Inactive Periods
cards.detect: Reward calculation doesn't exclude inactive periods
check: VERIFY: Reward calculation doesn't exclude inactive periods
cards.antipattern: Reward calculation doesn't exclude inactive periods
cards.securePattern: Track active epochs explicitly

cards.title: 7. Reward Period Boundary Errors
cards.detect: Off-by-one errors in reward period boundary calculations cause rewards to either overcount (distributing beyond the...
check: VERIFY: Off-by-one errors in reward period boundary calculations cause rewards to either overcount (distributing beyond the...

cards.title: 8. Liquid Staking: Pending Coin Inclusion in Unstake
cards.detect: Includes pending (not-yet-staked) SUI in total calculation
check: VERIFY: Includes pending (not-yet-staked) SUI in total calculation
cards.antipattern: Includes pending (not-yet-staked) SUI in total calculation
cards.securePattern: Only count actively staked SUI in exchange rate

cards.title: 9. Liquid Staking: Restake Routing Errors
cards.detect: Restake moves SUI but doesn't update validator distribution record
check: VERIFY: Restake moves SUI but doesn't update validator distribution record
cards.antipattern: Restake moves SUI but doesn't update validator distribution record
cards.securePattern: Update all tracking state on restake

cards.title: 10. Liquid Staking: Share Rounding Direction
cards.detect: When converting between SUI and staking shares (voSUI/stSUI), the rounding direction must always favor the protocol.
check: VERIFY: When converting between SUI and staking shares (voSUI/stSUI), the rounding direction must always favor the protocol.

cards.title: 11. Order Book: Base/Quote Quantity Mismatch
cards.detect: Uses fill quantity where order quantity is expected
check: VERIFY: Uses fill quantity where order quantity is expected
cards.antipattern: Uses fill quantity where order quantity is expected
cards.securePattern: Correctly compute base and quote quantities

cards.title: 12. Order Book: Partial Fill Tracking
cards.detect: Order books that allow partial fills must correctly track the unfilled quantity.
check: VERIFY: Order books that allow partial fills must correctly track the unfilled quantity.

cards.title: 13. Share Price Manipulation via Donation
cards.detect: Pool's Net Asset Value is directly manipulable
check: VERIFY: Pool's Net Asset Value is directly manipulable
cards.antipattern: Pool's Net Asset Value is directly manipulable

cards.title: 14. Share Price Inflation via Rounding Drift
cards.detect: Every withdrawal leaves dust, inflating share price
check: VERIFY: Every withdrawal leaves dust, inflating share price
cards.antipattern: Every withdrawal leaves dust, inflating share price
cards.securePattern: Use virtual offset pattern to minimize rounding impact

cards.title: 15. Exchange Rate Manipulation at Low TVL
cards.detect: When a liquid staking or vault protocol has very low TVL, the exchange rate is sensitive to small deposits or...
check: VERIFY: When a liquid staking or vault protocol has very low TVL, the exchange rate is sensitive to small deposits or...
Check first-depositor protection (virtual offset or minimum initial deposit)
Verify rounding direction favors protocol on all operations
Test exchange rate manipulation at very low TVL (< 100 tokens)
LOOK FOR: Exchange rate calculation: total_sui / total_shares (or similar)

cards.title: 1. UID Leak / Object Identity Bypass
cards.detect: The verifier does not validate structures without a `key` capability.
check: VERIFY: verifier does not validate structures without a `key` capability.
Verify all structs with UID field have `key` ability from initial publication
Check upgrade compatibility — no ability additions that bypass verifier
Ensure all shared object parameters have UID/ID validation
LOOK FOR: Structs without `key` ability that contain UID
cards.antipattern: V0 - struct without key, verifier doesn't check UID packing
cards.securePattern: Verifier should reject adding key ability to existing structs during upgrade

cards.title: 2. Dynamic Field Hash Collision
cards.detect: The `hash_type_and_key` function concatenates `parent`, `k_bytes`, and `k_tag_bytes` without inserting length delimiters.
check: VERIFY: `hash_type_and_key` function concatenates `parent`, `k_bytes`, and `k_tag_bytes` without inserting length delimiters.
LOOK FOR: Hash computations concatenating variable-length fields without separators
LOOK FOR: Custom hash_type_and_key implementations
cards.antipattern: No length delimiters between components
cards.securePattern: Length-prefix each component to prevent cross-boundary collisions

cards.title: 3. Package Digest Collision
cards.detect: Sorting and concatenating without item boundaries
check: VERIFY: Sorting and concatenating without item boundaries
cards.antipattern: Sorting and concatenating without item boundaries
cards.securePattern: Hash each module individually, then hash the concatenation of hashes

cards.title: 4. Object Size Limit DoS
cards.detect: max_slice_size too large, leaf objects will exceed 256KB
check: VERIFY: max_slice_size too large, leaf objects will exceed 256KB
cards.antipattern: max_slice_size too large, leaf objects will exceed 256KB
cards.securePattern: Use max_slice_size < 2000 to stay well under 256KB limit

cards.title: 5. Kiosk Extension Fund Locking
cards.detect: Disabling extensions locks user funds
check: VERIFY: Disabling extensions locks user funds
cards.antipattern: Disabling extensions locks user funds
cards.securePattern: Allow extension termination to recover funds even when disabled

cards.title: 6. Missing UID Validation in DeFi
cards.detect: Sui DeFi protocols often accept shared objects (banks, pools, oracles) as function parameters without verifying their...
check: VERIFY: Sui DeFi protocols often accept shared objects (banks, pools, oracles) as function parameters without verifying their...
LOOK FOR: Functions accepting &mut Bank or &Pool without asserting object::id()
LOOK FOR: Shared objects passed as parameters without cross-referencing stored IDs

cards.title: 7. Committee / Epoch Management Bugs
cards.detect: member_idx not reset between iterations
check: VERIFY: member_idx not reset between iterations
ANTIPATTERN: vec_map::insert fails on duplicate bridge_pubkey_bytes
cards.antipattern: vec_map::insert fails on duplicate bridge_pubkey_bytes
cards.securePattern: Check for existing pubkey before registration

cards.title: 8. Visibility / Ability Misuse via Upgrades
cards.detect: Public function allows arbitrary epoch manipulation
check: VERIFY: Public function allows arbitrary epoch manipulation
LOOK FOR: `public fun` on state-mutation functions that should be `public(friend)` or `public(package)`
LOOK FOR: Package upgrades adding abilities (key, store) to existing structs
cards.antipattern: Public function allows arbitrary epoch manipulation

cards.title: 9. Name Service Validation Failures
cards.detect: ttl not validated against MAX_TTL
check: VERIFY: ttl not validated against MAX_TTL
ANTIPATTERN: Returns empty string for normal domains, unvalidated for reverse domains
cards.antipattern: Returns empty string for normal domains, unvalidated for reverse domains

cards.title: 10. Dynamic Field Access Limit DoS
cards.detect: Sui enforces a strict limit of 1,000 dynamic field accesses per transaction.
check: VERIFY: Sui enforces a strict limit of 1,000 dynamic field accesses per transaction.
Check for unbounded loops accessing dynamic fields
Verify that batch operations have pagination or limits
Ensure push-based distribution is replaced with pull-based claims

cards.title: 1. Markdown/Control Character Injection in Transaction Rendering
cards.detect: The `renderSignTransaction` function interpolates raw transaction data into dialog text without escaping Markdown...
check: VERIFY: `renderSignTransaction` function interpolates raw transaction data into dialog text without escaping Markdown...
ANTIPATTERN: Raw transaction data rendered in Markdown dialog
cards.antipattern: Raw transaction data rendered in Markdown dialog

cards.title: 2. Markdown Injection in Message Signing
cards.detect: Raw message content shown in signing dialog
check: VERIFY: Raw message content shown in signing dialog
cards.antipattern: Raw message content shown in signing dialog
cards.securePattern: Sanitize message content and use copyable for addresses

cards.title: 3. Forced Transaction Signing via RPC
cards.detect: dApp can call signTransaction immediately without prior context
check: VERIFY: dApp can call signTransaction immediately without prior context
cards.antipattern: dApp can call signTransaction immediately without prior context
cards.securePattern: Require confirmation for key extraction, rate limit sign requests

cards.title: 4. Public Key Extraction Without User Consent
cards.detect: The `getPublicKey` and `getAccount` RPC methods return the user's public key and Sui address without displaying a...
check: VERIFY: `getPublicKey` and `getAccount` RPC methods return the user's public key and Sui address without displaying a...

cards.title: 5. User Confirmation Suppression
cards.detect: Account info returned without any user interaction
check: VERIFY: Account info returned without any user interaction
cards.antipattern: Account info returned without any user interaction
cards.securePattern: Show confirmation for account access with origin info

cards.title: 6. Key Derivation Path Manipulation
cards.detect: Derivation path not constrained to Sui BIP44 coin type
check: VERIFY: Derivation path not constrained to Sui BIP44 coin type
cards.antipattern: Derivation path not constrained to Sui BIP44 coin type
cards.securePattern: Restrict to Sui BIP44 coin type only

cards.title: 7. Development Origins in Production Builds
cards.detect: Development origins included in production build
check: VERIFY: Development origins included in production build
cards.antipattern: Development origins included in production build
cards.securePattern: Environment-based origin configuration
